name: Gefullte Kalbsbrust (Stuffed Veal Breast)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef, ground pork, egg, bread crumbs, lemon juice, nutmeg, salt, pepper, paprika, bay leaves, cloves, rosemary, and basil.
2. Stuff the mixture into a pocket of veal breast.
3. Sew closed or secure with toothpicks or skewers.
4. Brown the roast in melted shortening in an ovenproof casserole dish.
5. Add the remaining ingredients to the drippings in the casserole.
6. Bake the covered casserole at 325 degrees F for 2 hours, or until the veal is tender.
7. Slice and serve immediately.
